The '''''Doomer''''' was a [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]] that served with the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] defense fleet during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
The [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] was assigned to meet the [[MC80 Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 Star Cruiser]] ''[[Knights]]'', however both ships were attacked. The ''Doomer'' attempted to flee, but the vessel was destroyed by [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]].

{{Ship-stub}}
